regional_cost_note: Irrigation specialists in Gisborne typically charge $2,700–$6,500 for a residential lawn system and $8–$20/m² for drip irrigation, installed. Gisborne rates are typically 10–15% below the national average; some specialist trades travel from Hawke's Bay. A well-designed irrigation system pays for itself in water savings and plant health within 3–5 years.
